subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The glances of divine favour from the Kingdom of Glory encompass thee, and the bounties of His Holiness the One shower down like the rain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نظر عنایت از ملکوت عزت شامل است و الطاف حضرت احدیت مانند غیث
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @attaining the life of the spirit
